ab: yo su nainu’ musa’ nasali’?
en: How do you go to the block-house?

ab: pasṟaṟulu’ cu musa’ nasali’.
en: I drive to the block-house.

ab: yo nainu’ musa’ moṟow ising ka hiya?
en: How does he go to the hospital?

ab: maskakiy musa’ moṟow ising ka hiya.
en: He walks to the hospital.

ab: yo su nainu’ musa’ Ponghu’?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: patapanga cu ci hikoki’ musa Ponghu.
en: I go to Penghu by plane.

ab: yo su nainu’ musa’ Ponghu?
en: How do you go to Penghu?

ab: patapanga cu ci hune’ musa ponghu.
en: I go to Penghu by boat.

ab: patapanga su ci amol musa moṟow?
en: How do you go home?

ab: tapanga’ cu ci ceyun musa moṟow.
en: I go home by MRT.

ab: Yabung’ patapanga’ su ci amol musa papasba’an ci ke’?
en: How does Yabung go to school?

ab: tapanga’ kisya musa papasba’an ci ke’ ka Temi.
en: Temi goes to school by train.

ab: patapanga’ ci amol musa kiyokay ka Pawan?
en: How does Pawan go to church?

ab: paritensya musa kiyokay ka Pawan.
en: Pawan goes to church by bicycle.

ab: tapanga’ su ci ceyun musa’ papasba’an ci ke’?
en: Do you go to school by MRT?

ab: aṟaṟt, tapanga’ cu ci basu’ musa papasba’an ci ke’.
en: No, I go to school by bus.

ab: paritensy’a su musa’ papasba’an ci ke’?
en: Do you go to school by bicycle?

ab: ho’, pascitensya cu musa’ papasba’an ci ke’.
en: Yes, I go to school by bicycle.

ab: patapanga su ci kawte musa Taka’o?
en: Do you go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail?

ab: ho’, patapanga su ci kawte musa Taka’o.
en: Yes, I go to Kaohsiung by High Speed Rail.

ab: patapanga su ci kisya’ hala hikoki’ musa tayto’?
ch: A:你去台東搭火車還是搭飛機?
en: Are you going to Taitung by train or by plane?

ab: patapanga’ cu ci hikoki’, halilaw tehuk ka hikoki’ laha ci kisya’.
ch: B:我搭飛機，搭飛機比搭火車快。
en: I will take the plane because it is faster than the train.

ab: patapanga’ su ci basu hala patauṟit ci ṟaṟulu’ musa’ kiyokay?
ch: A:你去教會搭公車還是開車?
en: Are you going to drive to the church or take the bus?

ab: patiuṟit cu ci ṟaṟulu’ musa kiyokay, umabas mamicuw tehuk ka pati’uṟit ci ṟaṟulu’ laha ci ka tapangan basu.
ch: B:我開車去教會，開車比搭公車方便。
en: I will drive to the church because it is more convenient than the bus.

ab: hunsebeh moṟow mamu’ ka sobay?
en: Is the market close to your house?

ab: tapanga’ cu ci otobay musa sobsy, tuhya’ haṟi wa.
ch: B:不近，我都騎摩托車去超市。
en: No, it is not, so I always ride the motorcycle to the market.

ab: sibeh papasba’an ci ke’ ka yubing?
en: Is the post office close to the school?

ab: sibeh wa, tehkan micuw i maskakiy.
en: Yes, it is within walking distance.

ab: sibeh nanan ṟaṟulu’ ka nanean?
en: Is the restaurant close to the station?

ab: matata’ nanon ṟaṟulu’, maskakiy tikiy la ga, tehuk la.
ch: B:出車站再走五分鐘就到了。
en: It only takes five minutes after you walk out of the station.
